description.ko: 진동하는 액체 금속과 홀로그램 주파수를 통해 음파를 물리적인 빛으로 시각화한 추상적 표현입니다.
description.en: Abstract visualization of sound waves as physical light, featuring vibrating liquid metal and holographic frequencies.

prompt: A cinematic 3D render of ECHO-0, titled 'The Sonic Architect.' A central core of liquid chrome vibrating at high frequency, generating 3D holographic rings of #4169E1 blue waves and #FF4500 orange ripples. Geometric #32CD32 green particles and #FFD700 gold light trails manifest from the acoustic pressure. Set against a dark studio void, featuring hyper-realistic ray tracing and intricate UI elements reacting to invisible frequencies. 8k resolution, capturing the visual consonance of sound rendered as light.
